implementationGroups.title: Architecture risk: broad target endpoints
requiredBehaviors: The target content/session repositories keep this phase as pure in-memory seeded data with no file, SAF, MediaStore, or import/export path.
The target repositories keep media references as simple `mediaName` strings without adding viewer or bitmap-processing logic in phase-02.
The phase-02 content/session layer keeps seeded content separate from cross-screen state; no bundle or deeplink logic is implemented in the data source file itself.
The target keeps seeded content in `home_content_repository.cj` and route behavior in feature/app modules rather than mixing navigation surfaces into the data source.
The target keeps seeded content repositories permission-free in phase-02 and adds no request-permission scaffolding.
The HarmonyOS routing shell keeps the same route/shell scope without permission prompts, and `entry/src/main/module.json5::requestPermissions` remains empty.
`session_repository.cj` preserves the same shared in-memory state responsibilities without any permission prompt or protected-access flow.
`login_preferences_service.cj` persists login state through `Preferences` without any permission prompt or protected-access flow.
`LoginPreferencesService` preserves the same single-file single-key login preference contract and exposes read/write/toggle helpers over HarmonyOS `Preferences`.

`LoginPreferencesService` preserves the same persisted login-state contract, and phase-02 startup/login/profile consumers only need immediate reads or writes at route boundaries rather than a long-lived observer subscription.
riskHints: current evidence uses broad shell/root/whole-file endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Replace broad endpoints with precise target functions, types, resources, or tests before closing the group.

matchedGroups.title: Startup routing and splash gate
requiredBehaviors: Home start when login state is true.
Onboarding start when login state is false.
Loading gate clears only after start destination is resolved.
riskHints: Source uses blocking Flow read in startup; target should preserve user-visible gating without unnecessary shell coupling.
acceptanceEvidence: build gate pass
focused startup session test pass or compile pass
uiContracts: startup route chosen before normal navigation shell

matchedGroups.title: Session and selection repositories
requiredBehaviors: Repository reads provide ads, food, and restaurants for home UI.
Selected restaurant write must be observable by detail/history/cart flows.
Session toggle persists across startup.
riskHints: Source fake repositories are simple but UI relies on their immediate emission semantics.
acceptanceEvidence: focused repository refresh tests
build gate pass

matchedGroups.title: Navigation shell and bottom bar rules
requiredBehaviors: Route transitions preserve single-top style semantics where practical.
Bottom bar is not shown on onboarding, login, detail, cart, or profile surfaces.
riskHints: Do not overfit Android Nav APIs; preserve user-visible routing behavior only.
acceptanceEvidence: manual review of navigation shell
build gate pass
uiContracts: home and history show bottom bar when scroll position is at top
cart action sits above bottom bar

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.

A bounded `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` reproduction from `entry/src/test/cangjie` currently fails before phase-02 cases run because the test package does not provide HarmonyOS kit dependencies required by production imports such as `kit.AbilityKit`, `kit.ArkUI`, and `ohos.resource`, and the generated dependency scan also emits an invalid `-B` invocation.
Phase 02 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-02-startup-session-navigation/build-report.md`.

{'kind': 'manual-review', 'detail': "The only current-phase source observer uses `loginState.first()`, so the target's synchronous persisted read plus shared login/logout mutations preserve the same user-visible behavior."}
